facebook.caption: This place fixes a bad travel day. Ocean Night Bar at 01 Võ Thị Sáu hits different when the sun goes down. Grill smoke, cold drinks, ocean air. 4.8 stars across 444 reviews and it earns every one. Not a resort bar. Not a tourist trap. Just a spot that gets the vibe right. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Flames up, drinks poured, ocean right there. Ocean Night Bar at 01 Võ Thị Sáu is where your Phu Quoc nights should start. 4.8 stars. 444 people agree. Tag your travel buddy.
